{{Infobox spell
| name = Subspace warp
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Subspace]] warp is a visual phenomenon characterized by swirling colors, often appearing as a rainbow-colored circle, flower, or rose. These warps serve as openings or ruptures in reality that allow for travel between physical space and the dimension of [[Subspace]]. They can vary significantly in scale, ranging from small openings suitable for fighters to massive distortions large enough to potentially consume a planet. While they are primarily used as gateways for ships to dive into [[Subspace]], short-lived ruptures can also be utilized as weapons. The formation of these warps is often facilitated by a vessel's [[Subspace Drive]], though they can also be manifested through magical means. In some instances, warps act as exit points for fleets or individual ships emerging from the [[void]]. Navigating these openings can be hazardous; improper transitions can cause structural tension that threatens to destroy a ship, and the process of diving into [[Subspace]] can pull surrounding matter like atmosphere into the dimension, creating violent storms. Furthermore, being caught in [[Subspace]] without protection can lead to physical distortions or a psychological condition known as [[Subspace madness]], where individuals become obsessed with the patterns found within the dimension.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Subspace warp]] is a type of movement generated by an internal [[Drive]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c27">''The Engineer'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Subspace warp]] is a method of movement used by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A massive [[Subspace warp]] is approaching the system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Subspace warp]] opened up in front of the characters.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Subspace warp]] began to appear in front of the ship's nose.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax can tear apart a [[Subspace warp]] with a spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Spells]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
